description: Add Vercel config and deploy Delta Stump static site

userStories.title: Add vercel.json for static site deployment
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Vercel configuration so the static site deploys correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify index.html exists and loads correctly (has proper relative paths for CSS/JS)
Verify sitemap.xml and robots.txt are present
userStories.notes: Static HTML/CSS/JS site with CDN-hosted libraries (Lucide, Framer Motion, Google Fonts). No build step needed.

userStories.title: Deploy to Vercel
userStories.description: As a client, I want my stump removal website live at a public URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Live URL is accessible and renders the homepage
All CDN resources load (fonts, icons, animations)
